name: BlueRush Inc.
summary: BlueRush Inc., through its subsidiary BlueRush Digital Media Corp., provides software as a service based marketing and sales enablement platform that enables organizations to engage with their customers. The company offers IndiVideo, an interactive personalized video platform; and financial tools and calculators. It serves financial institutions, customer communications management organizations, public companies, insurance services, and pension funds in Canada, the United States, and internationally. The company was formerly known as BlueRush Media Group Corp. and changed its name to BlueRush Inc. in April 2018. BlueRush Inc. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
